prose:
Frontier-orbital calculation on pyridine (C₅H₄N, 11 atoms) using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard', density-fitted) in PySCF. Geometry: user-supplied .xyz, single point (not re-optimized at DFT level). Environment: gas phase. Charge: 0, multiplicity: 1 (closed-shell singlet). SCF converged in 10 cycles. No warnings reported. Integrity status: ok, trustworthy: true.

Results (Koopmans' theorem orbital energies):
  HOMO = −7.2525992 eV
  LUMO = −1.112786 eV
  HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.1398131 eV  ← headline value

Additional Koopmans/conceptual-DFT descriptors:
  Vertical IP = 7.2526 eV
  Vertical EA = 1.1128 eV
  Electronegativity = 4.1827 eV
  Chemical hardness = 3.0699 eV
  Chemical softness = 0.3257 eV⁻¹
  Electrophilicity index = 2.8494 eV

Total electronic energy: −248.3782 Hartree (−6758.7152 eV).

CLI invocation: cli.py frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz --out .../live.json
